name: O'henry Bars # 2
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Quick cooking rolled oats, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
Cream margarine, blend in sugar, syrup and vanilla. Stir in oats.
Spread into greased 13x9-inch pan. Bake for 15 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Do not bake any longer, even though the bars may not look cooked. Let cool. Melt chocolate chips and peanut butter over low heat and spread over baked oat mixture. Refrigerate until quite chilled. Cut into bars.
